title: Multi-target evaluation of Korean herbal compounds against the SRD5A2 / AR / beta-catenin axis for androgenetic alopecia: Boltz-2 cofold, ChEMBL-anchored ranking, ADMET-AI 107-endpoint safety panel, and pilosebaceous single-cell atlas-constrained prioritization of Saponin Re, Emodin, and Biochanin A
prior_history: ChemRxiv rejected 2026-04-30 (scope); bioRxiv rejected 2026-04-28 as BIORXIV/2026/721248 ('not a complete research paper'); reframed in v0.3 with same 4-layer framework + pilosebaceous single-cell atlas constraint and resubmitted 2026-05-03.
